news.headline: Intel (INTC) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
news.summary: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after the stock rebounded as CEO Lip-Bu Tan's Computex comments continued to cut through the noise.

news.headline: ASTS, RKLB, SPCE, RDW Stocks Extend Selloff Overnight — Analyst Backs 'Betting Against Space' Trade As Jefferies Courts SpaceX Bears
news.summary: Hedge funds seeking bearish bets on SpaceX have reportedly approached Jefferies, which was absent from the IPO's underwriting lineup.

news.headline: Should Apple’s Gemini‑Powered Siri and iOS Payments Push Require Action From AAPL Investors?
news.summary: In the lead-up to its June 2026 Worldwide Developers Conference, Apple signaled a major overhaul of Siri using Google’s Gemini AI models and previewed native bill‑splitting tools that scan receipts, deepening integration

news.headline: Super Micro Extends AI Factory Reach With Helios Launch And US$2b Deal
news.summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has rolled out its AMD Helios rack-scale AI platform aimed at hyperscale AI, sovereign AI, and large language model deployments. The company introduced new Arm AGI CPU powered servers

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $744.21 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $754.24 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $744.21 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NFLX PUT — enter $2.96–$3.28, target $4.68+, stop $1.87.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.26% and SPY -0.70%. Composite sentiment -41 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), spy trend, sector rotation. VIX at 15.13 (+0.26%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Energy (+1.29%) is leading while Communication (-1.31%) lags. Premarket strength in META, AMD; weakness in PLTR, COIN. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NFLX (7.2/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
